name: Corpus Nullifier Crewman
summary: A Corpus specialist enemy known for its disruptive bubble and anti-ability pressure.
description: Specialist Corpus crewman archetype with defensive disruption mechanics.

recommendedStatusPlan: Use fast shield popping and keep a precise answer for the bubble.
Avoid overcommitting to ability loops that fail inside disruption zones.

notes: This record should later be expanded with specific bubble interaction rules.
Nullifiers are high-value priority targets even when they are not the room's tankiest enemy.
